race.comment: BRAVE WASP (1) has switched to the Mitch Pateman barn since his last campaign where he was beaten 2.1L in a stronger race. Back to maiden company here on the back of a couple handy trials, with Carbery sticking from those heats. Can return with a bang. NICE SORT (8) will appreciate this level of race today after tackling much stronger races to begin her career. She was good in a recent trial and Pike hopping on board is a big push for her chances. Looks well placed back to this grade and can make her presence felt. GREAT RECEPTION (3) disappointed before the break but has trialled well coming into this campaign. The wide draw is a query, but he looks poised to strike on what we've seen at the trials coming in. WHITE HOT (10) will be fitter for a recent trial and won't be far away. MOON JEWEL (6) is back to maiden company today after a good run in tougher company last start. Can improve again.
